Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class NamedCredential

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.NamedCredential
public class NamedCredential extends SObject

Java class for NamedCredential complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="NamedCredential">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="AuthProvider" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}AuthProvider" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AuthProviderId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AuthTokenEndpointUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CalloutOptionsAllowMergeFieldsInBody" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CalloutOptionsAllowMergeFieldsInHeader" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CalloutOptionsGenerateAuthorizationHeader" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CustomHttpHeaders" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DeveloperName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Endpoint" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="JwtAudience" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="JwtFormulaSubject" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="JwtIssuer" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="JwtTextSubject" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="JwtValidityPeriodSeconds" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Language" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MasterLabel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NamespacePrefix" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PaymentGateways" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PrincipalType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SetupEntityAccessItems" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserAuths" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
